biography: Tomas, representing Espoo Ringside Golf, has been a familiar presence within the competitive landscape of the Hector Trophée. During his tenure, his participation contributed to the event's vibrant atmosphere, embodying the spirit of sportsmanship and the challenge inherent in this unique pair competition.

Over the course of his three appearances in the Hector Trophée, Tomas consistently engaged with the demanding formats, showcasing his capabilities on the greens. While he did not ultimately secure victory in either the coveted Hector Trophée team event or claim the individual Victor Trophy, his commitment to the tournament remained steadfast throughout his competitive outings.

As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, Tomas is considered retired from active participation in these events. His period as a competitor, though now concluded, remains a part of the tournament's history, highlighting the diverse range of talents and dedicated individuals who have graced its fairways.
